flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Valley Forge are 34% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($39.0k vs $59.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 46% at University of Valley Forge vs the 2003–2007 baseline (471 vs 874).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Valley Forge rose 28% between 2006 and 2009 ($11.7k → $14.9k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at University of Valley Forge fell 12% between 2006 and 2009 (52.5% → 46.0%).
